details: Compound 16 (5-Ethoxy-6-phenyl-...hexahydroimidazo[...]thieno[3,2-e]pyrimidine) mp 163 °C confirmed in experimental section; DOI 10.3390/71000756 matches paper PMC6146533.
Compound 13 (tetramethyl diacetoxymethyl dodecacyclo... tetracarboxylate) mp 245-247 °C confirmed; DOI 10.3390/60300194 matches PMC6236343.
Compound 9a (2-(5-Bromo-2-hydroxy-4-methylphenyl)-2-oxoethyl acetate) mp 86-87 °C confirmed in synthesis section 2.3.9; DOI 10.1021/acsomega.6c01037 matches PMC13103808.
Compound 3e (2-((4,6-Dichloro-1,3,5-triazin-2-yl)amino)-N-(2-(3-methoxyphenoxy)phenyl)acetamide) m.p. 160-164 °C confirmed in synthesis section; DOI 10.3390/molecules31050862 matches PMC12985466.
Intermediate 3 (1-Methyl-3-(trifluoromethyl)-1H-pyrazole-4-carbohydrazide) Mp 145-146 °C confirmed in experimental section; DOI 10.1007/s11164-022-04839-x matches PMC9486790.
Table 5 row for Propionic acid: Melting Peak column = -22.2 ± 0.08 °C, which corresponds to overlay enum DSC_peak; DOI 10.3390/ma13204486 matches muller_2020 PCM PDF.
Compound 2b (Ethyl 1-hydroxy-1H-indole-2-carboxylate; paper spells 'Ethyle') mp 175-177 °C confirmed; CSV name uses corrected IUPAC spelling, compound identity matches.
Compound 6f (6-fluoro-5-(4-phenylpiperazin-1-yl)-1H-benzo[d]imidazole) M.P. 130-132 °C confirmed in section 3.1; DOI 10.3390/molecules31050844 matches PMC12986465.
Compound 5c (9-methyl-6-(4-nitrobenzyl)-6H-benzo[c]chromene) Mp 133 °C confirmed; DOI 10.3390/molecules31040706 matches PMC12943095.
Compound 12r (7-((1-(...)triazol-4-yl)methoxy)-...-carboxamide) MP 247-249 °C confirmed in section 4.1.18; DOI 10.1039/d5ra09311b matches PMC13093879.

DOI 10.1021/ci700307p (Karthikeyan/Vyas/Glen 2008 J Chem Inf Model) is the cited source paper that contains the 287-compound Tm dataset, but this paper file is NOT present in the corpus. The mapped folder PMC4724158 is a different paper that only cites ci700307p in its reference list; PMC4724158 itself does not contain 'acebutolol' or the value 123.0. Cannot verify the row against the actual source paper.
Compound 5c (3-Ethoxycarbonyl-2-(3-hydroxypropyl)-isoquinolinium chloride) mp 142-44 °C (range-shorthand for 142-144) confirmed in experimental section; DOI 10.3390/70200252 matches PMC6146463.

Table 1 row H(1) gives azide decomposition temperature 96 °C for N'-(p-toluenesulfonyl)phenoxycarbimidoyl azide (1); property=decomposition matches column header 'Azide dec. temp.'; DOI 10.3390/70200189 matches PMC6146427.

Compound 4a (N-[(3,5-dimetyl-4-iodo-1H-pyrazol-1-yl)-methyl]-4-fluoroaniline; paper spells 'dimetyl', CSV uses 'dimethyl') mp 144-145 °C confirmed; DOI 10.3390/antibiotics15020127 matches PMC12937307.
Compound 3a (N-(2-((2-(3-Methoxyphenoxy)phenyl)amino)-2-oxoethyl)-4-nitrobenzamide) m.p. 134-136 °C confirmed in synthesis section; DOI 10.3390/molecules31050862 matches PMC12985466.

Compound 4w ((E)-2,5-dioxo-1-(2-oxo-2-phenylethylidene)-...thieno[3,2-e]pyrrolo[1,2-a]pyrimidine-3-carbonitrile) m.p. 296-297 °C confirmed (Cyrillic °С in paper); DOI 10.1021/acs.joc.9b00711 matches Rubstov 2019 PDF.
Compound 6d (4-((2-(Benzo[d]thiazole-2-carbonyl)hydrazono)methyl)phenyl methanesulfonate) mp 219-221 °C confirmed in section 3.1.1.4; DOI 10.1039/d4ra07810a matches PMC11843914.
Tetrachloromethane experimental boiling point 76.7 °C confirmed in Table 2 (first column = experimental); DOI 10.1897/01-363 matches Dearden 2003 boiling-point QSPR PDF.
Compound 5d (4-fluoro-5-(4-isopropylpiperazin-1-yl)benzene-1,2-diamine) M.P. 127-129 °C confirmed in section 3.1; DOI 10.3390/molecules31050844 matches PMC12986465.
Acetohydrazide (compound 3) mp 58 °C confirmed in experimental section, Method 1; DOI 10.1007/s13738-021-02358-x matches PMC8332001.
Compound 5a (N-(3-chlorophenyl)-6-iodoquinazoline-4-amine) mp 219-221 °C confirmed in experimental section; DOI 10.3390/ijms27041738 matches PMC12941058.
Table 1 row R=3-Me for 1-(Diacetoxyiodo)-3-methylbenzene mp 153-55 °C (= 153-155) confirmed; DOI 10.3390/61100881 matches PMC6236348.
Diiodomethane experimental boiling point 182.1 °C confirmed in Table 2 (first/experimental column); DOI 10.1897/01-363 matches Dearden 2003 boiling-point QSPR PDF.

Table 5 'Tb [K]' STRM column for Baricitinib = 794.469 K; 794.469 - 273.15 = 521.319 °C arithmetic correct; STRM (stepwise regression method) is a calculated/predicted value, so meas_calc=calculated correct; DOI 10.1016/j.cdc.2021.100820 matches PMC8697427.

Table II row 10 records value as '260°C, decomp.' — the explicit 'decomp.' label means the observed phenomenon is decomposition, not a clean melt. Per the rubric, melting_point assigned to a value labeled 'decomposition' fails Q2; property should be 'decomposition'. Compound name (4-(5"-carboxyethyl-4"-thiazolidinone-2"-acetylazino)-4'-acetyldiphenyl sulphide, compound 10) and value 260 °C are correctly matched; only the property-type is mismatched.
